basis: Daily GB net import value = sum over settled half-hours of max(net interconnector inflow, 0) × ½h × GB system sell price. Export half-hours are floored to £0: the metric captures what the system paid to attract electricity from interconnected markets, not what was earned on export flows. Settled data: Elexon FUELHH (interconnectors) and Elexon system cash-out price, back to 2016.
source: Elexon FUELHH net interconnector flow × Elexon system (cash-out) price, settled, back to 2016
metric_label: net imported energy valued at the GB system price
caveat: Net imported energy valued at the GB system (cash-out) price — not the contractual cost of the imports, which clear in the day-ahead auction.
